{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041636239AC3F495CF20A9CC45"}"},"total":1297},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7527282217763619608","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好看，文笔风趣幽默，还能学到点海洋知识。","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":16,"text":"海洋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%B7%E6%B4%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412419620A9CC45%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227527282217763619608%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227339824397093440574%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%B7%E6%B4%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752586698,"group_id":"7339824397093440574","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/tKCbYE6ujumowHx2wVcRzqwfJ3ZHfZqyFyHYddCmFM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"4468835367027757","user_name":"爱吃肉桂南瓜派的孟黎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4468835367027757","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7339824397093440574","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统不重生，多女主，钓鱼佬的快活人生）
严初九上门去给太太修了个水管，不小心被咬了一口后，身体竟然发生了突变。
开启水眼金睛，龟式呼吸，力大如牛……从此钓鱼爆护，赶海爆桶，捕鱼爆仓。
………
严初九：你们打龟？那我抛一竿试试。
“咻——”
“哈哈，他挂地球了！”
“啊，不对，他中鱼了，好大，是巨物！”
………
严初九：有妹纸溺水？长得不错，那我下去试试。
“卟嗵！”
“完球了，半个小时没上来，估计陪葬了！”
“啊，他上来了，上来了，还把妹纸救上来了。”
………
严初九：你们养藏獒？那我养条土狗试试。
“昂唔！”
“他那条是什么狗？丑不垃圾的！”
“我天，他的狗会变色，还能潜海寻宝！”
………
严初九：你们相亲？那我问下女钓友有没有口。
“靓女…”
“别说话，吻我，带我出海去逐浪！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b4d00e7572f43e942ec81e00c69ca8b","author":"作家了了一生","author_id":"","book_id":"7339824397093440574","book_name":"一不小心，我竟然成了海神","book_short_name":"远海破浪者","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#485060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7339824854989816382","read_count":"42296","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3790365"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1489","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,宠物,美食,多女主,钓鱼,搞笑轻松,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/6ece00fe8fa60119e43fd8fdea2c1850~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308196&x-signature=jc4EQHoHpjnnF14uD9koDftnB%2B8%3D","tomato_book_status":
